input_format: line1: nums (JSON int array); line2: k (int)

testcases.desc: Edge: example1, dup at exact distance
Edge: n=1 single element, cannot pair
Edge: k=0 means same index, no valid pair
Edge: all distinct, large k irrelevant
Standard: dup just out of range
Edge: extreme values at boundary distance
Stress: large k, dup at boundary
Stress: large n near max boundary
